title: eriogonum ochrocephalum var. calcareum
intro: Eriogonum ochrocephalum var. calcareum, also known as Mountain Buckwheat or California Buckwheat, is a perennial plant that belongs to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Its health benefits include soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Eriogonum ochrocephalum var. calcareum can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed for medicinal purposes.
